strategy: action_pooling — read-only tasks batch; ref docs/ACTION-POOLING-AND-BATCHING.md

Verify GEMINI_GROUNDING=true with paid key; update .env.example + health.pcsf.json
Backend Vosk STT fallback for non-Chrome; route POST /api/dream/transcribe

Research web-based convergence loop refinements: GitOps best practices, monorepo CI convergence patterns, automated evidence collection, and promotion gate strategies. Output: csf/ingest/convergence-web-refinement.md with implementation sketch.
Blockchain-inspired bounded validation ring: 3-agent consensus, SHA-256 hash chain, tamper-evident JSONL. Runs as phase 9 in convergence loop.

notes: Validation ring is now the primary skepticism gate. Critical/high severity failures block promotion. Medium/low are warnings. Gemini key rate-limited until daily quota reset. Use ANTHROPIC_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY as fallback for agent work.
